WHERE {
  ?company wdt:P112 ?founder .

can i play don't starve on play station 4?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?game ?platform
WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P31 wd:Q15717354 .
  ?game wdt:P400 wd:Q866 .
  ?game wdt:P404 ?mode .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(str(?game), "Don't Starve")) .
  ?platform wdt:P31 wd:Q866 .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(str(?platform), "PlayStation 4"))
}

question.string: How many General Secretaries of the CPSU were there before Leonid Brezhnev?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?generalSecretary) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?generalSecretary p:P3975 ?generalSecretaryStatement .
  ?generalSecretaryStatement ps:P3975 wd:Q861513 .
  ?generalSecretaryStatement pq:P580 ?generalSecretaryStart .
  BIND(wd:Q765165 AS ?brezhnev) .
  ?brezhnev p:P3975 ?brezhnevStatement .
  ?brezhnevStatement ps:P3975 wd:Q861513 .
  ?brezhnevStatement pq:P580 ?brezhnevStart .
  FILTER (?generalSecretaryStart < ?brezhnevStart)
  FILTER (?generalSecretary != ?brezhnev)
}

Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.

query.sparql:
SELECT ?verb ?lemma
WHERE {
  ?verb wdt:P407 "tr" .
  ?verb wdt:P518 ?form .
  FILTER(STRENDS(?form, "uş")) .
  ?verb wdt:P5819 ?lemma .
}

question.string: From which country are the beagles originally from?
From which country came the 2nd most winners of the Emmy Award ?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?country (COUNT(?winner) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q190882 .
  ?winner wdt:P27 ?country .
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 2
OFFSET 1

question.string: Does the music style of Helloween belong to rock music?

has adam ondra been a winner of IFSC climbing world cup?
has life expectancy in iran grown in any year after 1999?
has population of Isfahan increased at any point after 2006?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?population ?date
WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P1082 ?population .
  ?item wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER (?date > "2006-01-01"^^xsd:date) .
  ?item wdt:P17 wd:Q115522 .
  ?item wdt:P1082 ?previousPopulation .
  ?item wdt:P585 ?previousDate .
  FILTER (?previousDate < "2006-01-01"^^xsd:date) .
  FILTER (?population > ?previousPopulation) .
}

query.sparql:

WHERE {
  ?author wdt:P50 ?work .
  ?author wdt:P9687 "Sarah" .
  ?author wdt:P9688 "Maas" .
  FILTER(NOT EXISTS { ?work wdt:P31 wd:Q98912 }) .

}

How many countries have mountains whose peaks are higher than 2000m above sea level?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?country) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?mountain wdt:P2044 ?elevation .
  FILTER(?elevation > 2000) .
  ?mountain wdt:P4552 ?mountain_range .
  ?country wdt:P307 ?mountain_range .
  BIND(REPLACE(STR(?country), "http://www.wikidata.org/entity/", "") AS ?countryID) .
  FILTER(EXISTS { ?country wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 }) .
}

question.string: How many fictional dragons are present in Game of Thrones?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?dragon) AS (?count))
WHERE {
  wd:Q23572 wdt:P674 ?character .
  ?character wdt:P31 wd:Q169262 .
  FILTER CONTAINS(str(?character), "dragon")
  BIND(?character AS ?dragon)
}

question.string: Were Angela Merkel and Tony Blair born in the same year?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?merkelBirthYear ?blairBirthYear WHERE {
  wd:Q567 p:P569 ?merkelBirth .
  wd:Q9545 p:P569 ?blairBirth .
  BIND(YEAR(?merkelBirth) AS ?merkelBirthYear) .
  BIND(YEAR(?blairBirth) AS ?blairBirthYear) .
  FILTER(?merkelBirthYear = ?blairBirthYear)
}

question.string: Do more than 100000000 people speak Japanese?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?itemLabel (COUNT(?speaker) AS ?speakers)
WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P407 wd:Q5287 .
  ?speaker wdt:P103 wd:Q17 .
  FILTER (LANGMATCHES(LANG(?speaker), 'ja'))
}
GROUP BY ?item ?itemLabel
HAVING ((COUNT(?speaker)) > 100000000)

What event killed the most people in the years 1910 to 1920?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?event (COUNT(?person) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P20 ?place .
  ?event wdt:P1582 ?place .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) >= 1910) .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) <= 1920) .
  ?person wdt:P569 ?date .
}
GROUP BY ?event
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1

What is the second game developed by Piranha Bytes?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?game ?gameLabel
WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P178 ?developer .
  ?developer wdt:P735 "Piranha Bytes"@en .
  ?game wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  {
    SELECT ?game (COUNT(?earlierGame) AS ?earlierGames)
    WHERE {
      ?game wdt:P178 ?developer .
      ?developer wdt:P735 "Piranha Bytes"@en .
      ?game wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
      ?earlierGame wdt:P178 ?developer .
      ?earlierGame wdt:P577 ?earlierReleaseDate .
      FILTER(?earlierReleaseDate < ?releaseDate) .
    }
    GROUP BY ?game
  }
  FILTER(?earlierGames = 1)
}
ORDER BY ?releaseDate
LIMIT 1

Where was Goethe’s unmarried partner born ?
Where was Roland Corporation founded?
Where was the author of The Catcher in the Rye born ?
Who developed the Erlangen program?

which animal can possibly live longer, panda or koala?
Which archipelago has more islands: the Galápagos Islands or the Hawaiian Islands ?
Which art movement was Yoko Ono part of?
which band is created earlier, queen or pink floyd?
What caused Kobe Bryant's Death?
What are the opposites of zero?
Which businesses are founded by the person in charge of Tesla?
Did Germany have a population growth of at least 1% since 2010?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?country ?populationGrowth
WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P2926 ?populationGrowth .
  ?country wdt:P298 ?isoCode .
  FILTER (?isoCode = "DE") .
  FILTER (?populationGrowth > 0.01) .
  FILTER (YEAR(?date) > 2010) .
  BIND(YEAR(?date) AS ?year) .
}

question.string: Which aircraft did Howard Hughes build?
Which country has more official languages: South Africa (​​Q258) or Ethiopia ?
Is throat singing a tradition?
Which disease caused the death of Mark Twain?
Which diseases can be caused by smoking ?
Which genre that Cage the Elephant belongs to has the fewest english characters?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?genre ?length WHERE {
  wd:Q68061 wdt:P136 ?genre .
  ?genre rdfs:label ?genreLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?genreLabel), "en")) .
  BIND(STRLEN(?genreLabel) AS ?length) .
}
ORDER BY ?length
LIMIT 1

question.string: Which takes less space? 1kg of lead or 1kg of iron.
Which kingdom preceded the Thonburi Kingdom ?
How many mountains are located in Germany?
Which movements is the painting “Les Demoiselles d'Avignon” assigned to?
Which movies belong to the Cornetto trilogy ?
During what event was the Four Policemen Council proposed?
Which NBA teams have won the most seasons?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?team (COUNT(DISTINCT ?season) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?team wdt:P31/wdt:P279* wd:Q3942358 .
  ?season wdt:P5138 ?team .
  ?team wdt:P2522 ?season .
  FILTER (REGEX(STR(?team), "NBA"))
}
GROUP BY ?team
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

query.sparql:
SELECT ?pyramid ?height
WHERE {
  ?pyramid wdt:P31 wd:Q12140 .
  ?pyramid wdt:P17 wd:Q79 .
  ?pyramid wdt:P2049 ?height .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?height)
LIMIT 1

who is the youngested member in g-idle?
who is older, Lionel Messi or Cristiano Ronaldo？

query.sparql:
SELECT ?messiAge ?ronaldoAge
WHERE {
  BIND(YEAR(NOW()) - YEAR(?messiBirthdate) AS ?messiAge) .
  BIND(YEAR(NOW()) - YEAR(?ronaldoBirthdate) AS ?ronaldoAge) .
  FILTER (EXISTS { wd:Q615 wdt:P569 ?messiBirthdate }) .
  FILTER (EXISTS { wd:Q11571 wdt:P569 ?ronaldoBirthdate }) .
}

question.string: Is heidelberg university or university hamburg founded earlier?
which forest is bigger, Amazon Rainforest or Congo Basin?

which company is founded later, samsung or sony?
who is taller, Lionel Messi or Cristiano Ronaldo？
who has won more NBA awards, Michael Jordan or Kobe Bean Bryant？
Did Michael Jordan ever weigh more than Kobe Bean Bryant？

query.sparql:
SELECT ?mjWeight ?kbbWeight
WHERE {
  BIND(wd:Q41421 AS ?mj) .
  BIND(wd:Q25369 AS ?kbb) .
  OPTIONAL { ?mj wdt:P6076 ?mjWeight } .
  OPTIONAL { ?kbb wdt:P6076 ?kbbWeight } .
  FILTER (?mjWeight > ?kbbWeight) .
}

question.string: Who is older, Sebastian Vettel or Lewis Hamilton?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?vettelAge ?hamiltonAge
WHERE {
  wd:Q42311 wdt:P569 ?vettelBirth .
  wd:Q9673 wdt:P569 ?hamiltonBirth .
  BIND(YEAR(NOW()) - YEAR(?vettelBirth) AS ?vettelAge) .
  BIND(YEAR(NOW()) - YEAR(?hamiltonBirth) AS ?hamiltonAge) .
  FILTER(?vettelAge > ?hamiltonAge)
}
LIMIT 1

who lives longer, series black or bellatrix Lestrange?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?bellatrixLifespan ?blackSeriesLifespan WHERE {
  wd:Q36864844 wdt:P569 ?bellatrixBirth .
  wd:Q36864844 wdt:P570 ?bellatrixDeath .
  BIND(YEAR(?bellatrixDeath) - YEAR(?bellatrixBirth) AS ?bellatrixLifespan) .
  wd:Q15709114 wdt:P6118 ?blackSeasonEnd .
  wd:Q15709114 wdt:P580 ?blackSeasonStart .
  BIND(YEAR(?blackSeasonEnd) - YEAR(?blackSeasonStart) AS ?blackSeriesLifespan) .
  FILTER(?bellatrixLifespan > ?blackSeriesLifespan)
}

SELECT ?nativeName
WHERE {
  wd:Q878165 wdt:P85 ?anthem .
  ?anthem wdt:P86 ?composer .
  ?composer wdt:P735 ?nativeName .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?nativeName), "ja"))
}
